languages.text: Союзники получают +1 AP за каждые два ранка Heretical.

traits.locale_text: Союзники получают +1 AP за каждые два ранка Heretical.

languages.text: As long as Uralon is conscious, Uralon's allies gain +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} for every 2 {g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkCorruption}Heretical{/g} ranks they have.

traits.locale_text: As long as Uralon is conscious, Uralon's allies gain +1 AP for every 2 Heretical ranks they have.

languages.text: Пока Уралон в сознании, его союзники получают +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}ОД{/g} за каждые 2 своих ранга {g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkCorruption}Еретика{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Пока Уралон в сознании, его союзники получают +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}ОД{/g} за каждые 2 своих ранга {g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkCorruption}Еретика{/g}.
Пока Уралон в сознании, его союзники получают +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}ОД{/g} за каждые 2 своих ранга {g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkCorruption}Еретика{/g}.

languages.text: Tant qu'Uralon est conscient, ses alliés gagnent +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}PA{/g} pour chaque tranche de 2 rangs {g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkCorruption}Hérétiques{/g} qu'ils ont acquis.
languages.original_text: As long as Uralon is conscious, Uralon's allies gain +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} for every 2 {g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkCorruption}Heretical{/g} ranks they have.

traits.locale_text: Tant qu'Uralon est conscient, ses alliés gagnent +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}PA{/g} pour chaque tranche de 2 rangs {g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkCorruption}Hérétiques{/g} qu'ils ont acquis.

languages.text: Uralon baygın olmadığı sürece Uralon'un dost birimleri, sahip oldukları her 2 {g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkCorruption}Kâfirce{/g} kademesi için +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}EP{/g} kazanır.
languages.original_text: As long as Uralon is conscious, Uralon's allies gain +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} for every 2 {g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkCorruption}Heretical{/g} ranks they have.

traits.locale_text: Uralon baygın olmadığı sürece Uralon'un dost birimleri, sahip oldukları her 2 {g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkCorruption}Kâfirce{/g} kademesi için +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}EP{/g} kazanır.

languages.text: 只要乌拉隆处于清醒状态，其盟友每拥有2个{g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkCorruption}异端主义{/g}等级，他们就获得1点{g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}行动点数{/g}。
languages.original_text: As long as Uralon is conscious, Uralon's allies gain +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} for every 2 {g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkCorruption}Heretical{/g} ranks they have.

traits.locale_text: 只要乌拉隆处于清醒状态，其盟友每拥有2个{g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkCorruption}异端主义{/g}等级，他们就获得1点{g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}行动点数{/g}。

languages.text: Mientras Uralon esté consciente, sus aliados ganan +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}PA{/g} por cada 2 rangos de {g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkCorruption}Hereje{/g} que tenga.
languages.original_text: As long as Uralon is conscious, Uralon's allies gain +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} for every 2 {g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkCorruption}Heretical{/g} ranks they have.

traits.locale_text: Mientras Uralon esté consciente, sus aliados ganan +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}PA{/g} por cada 2 rangos de {g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkCorruption}Hereje{/g} que tenga.

languages.text: Solange Uralon bei Bewusstsein ist, erhalten seine Verbündeten +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} für jeweils 2 {g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkCorruption}Ketzer{/g}-Ränge, die sie haben.
languages.original_text: As long as Uralon is conscious, Uralon's allies gain +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} for every 2 {g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkCorruption}Heretical{/g} ranks they have.

traits.locale_text: Solange Uralon bei Bewusstsein ist, erhalten seine Verbündeten +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} für jeweils 2 {g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkCorruption}Ketzer{/g}-Ränge, die sie haben.

languages.text: ウラロンが意識を保っている限り、ウラロンの味方は、自身が持つ{g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkCorruption}異端{/g}ランク2につき+1の{g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g}を得る。
languages.original_text: As long as Uralon is conscious, Uralon's allies gain +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} for every 2 {g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkCorruption}Heretical{/g} ranks they have.

traits.locale_text: ウラロンが意識を保っている限り、ウラロンの味方は、自身が持つ{g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkCorruption}異端{/g}ランク2につき+1の{g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g}を得る。
